title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people cooking dinner. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A father and his teenage daughter are cooking dinner in a kitchen. The father is cutting vegetables and the girl is stirring food in a pan. There are bowls and fresh vegetables on the worktop.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at a swimming pool. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Several children are having a swimming lesson in an indoor pool. One child is swimming while an instructor is watching from the side. There are floats, towels and pool steps nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
